_comment: Curated supporter-venue ground truth — see supporters.atlanta.json for schema. verified:false = needs a local confirmation pass before launch.

venues.name: The Pint Public House
venues.note: Gastown sports pub; a central Vancouver soccer-watching venue that opens early for big matches.

venues.name: Doolin's Irish Pub
venues.note: Downtown Irish pub; multi-screen internationals and Premier League.

venues.name: Library Square Public House
venues.note: Downtown pub near the library; shows big matches, convenient for the host city centre.
